mapper.update: merge into festival_info f using dual on (f.content_id = #{content_id}) when matched then update set f.title = #{title}, f.addr1 = #{addr1}, f.region_code = #{region_code}, f.modified_time = #{modified_time} when not matched then insert (content_id, title, addr1, region_code, created_time, modified_time) values (#{content_id}, #{title}, #{addr1}, #{region_code}, #{created_time}, #{modified_time})
